top_signals.title: Middle East Shipping Threats Rise as Owners Plot Best Course
top_signals.summary: Challenges to shipping in the Middle East escalated, as a call from Iran-backed Houthi rebels against servicing Saudi ports spurred unusual maneuvers in the Red Sea, while a European Union naval group raised its threat level for the waterway.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Zelenskyy replaces top Ukraine general after mass protests
top_signals.summary: President chooses 43-year-old Mykhailo Drapatyi to replace Oleksandr Syrsky in generational shift in Kyiv’s military leadership
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Equinor Profit Soars 93% as Oil and Gas Price Spike Fuels Windfall
top_signals.summary: Equinor (EQNR:NYSE) saw a 93% jump in its second-quarter profit from a year earlier as oil and gas prices soared during the Middle East crisis and delivered windfall earnings to the biggest energy firms. The Norwegian major on Wednesday reported an adjusted operating income after tax of $3.225 billion for the second quarter, up by 93% from the $1.670 billion for the same period last year, and slightly lower than a company-provided analyst consensus estimate of $3.38 billion. The adjusted operating income surged by 76% to $11.482 billion, up from…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: OpenAI appoints two new members to board of directors
top_signals.summary: OpenAI appointed longtime financial executives David Vélez and Robin Vince to its nonprofit and for-profit boards.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Galaxy pledges $5M for developers quantum-proofing Bitcoin
top_signals.summary: Galaxy pledged up to $5 million in grants for developers working on Bitcoin’s quantum security and elected a council of quantum-advisory experts to research quantum-resistant migration solutions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
